ocr.text: The first table presents data on recombinant strains, with headers including Recombinant Strain, Breakpoints, Parental
Sequence, and Detection Methods (p-Value). The strain SCcd16 has breakpoints ranging from 10,401 to 13,841, with a parental
sequence of NADC30 and JXA1, displaying p-values of 2.120 × 10−51 for RDP, 1.358 × 10−13 for GENECONV, 2.281 ×
10−52 for BootScan, 5.308 × 10−21 for MaxChi, 2.234 × 10−23 for Chimaera, 1.473 × 10−32 for SiScan, and 1.069 × 10−120
for 3Seq. The next entry, 13,842 to 15,281, lists FJFS as the parental sequence, with p-values of 5.691 × 10−26 for RDP, NS for
GENECONV, 5.511 × 10−16 for BootScan, 5.874 × 10−19 for MaxChi, 2.155 × 10−11 for Chimaera, 3.554 × 10−21 for
SiScan, and 2.593 × 10−34 for 3Seq. The strain SCya17 spans 11,603 to 12,498 with NADC30 and JXA1 as parental
sequences, showing p-values of 2.845 × 10−40 for RDP, 3.323 × 10−14 for GENECONV, and others. Lastly, from 12,690 to

14,777, XJzx1-2015 is the parental sequence, yielding p-values of 1.374 × 10−49 for RDP and NS for GENECONV. 

The
second table lists names, accession numbers, lengths, and top blast hits.

Rorb  AB689002 ENSPSIT00000006123  319  90% identical to Green Anole Rorb (XM_003216536)
Satb2 has accession AB689003 ENSPSIT00000020487, a length of 521 bp, and is 92% identical to chicken Satb2
(XM_421919). Mef2c, accession AB689005 ENSPSIT00000013823, measures 601 bp with 93% identity to Green Anole Mef2c
(XM_003216358). Er81, with accession AB689006 ENSPSIT00000009495, is 547 bp and 93% identical to chicken Er81
(NM_204917). Fezf2, accession AB689007 ENSPSIT00000010810, has a length of 387 bp and is 90% identical to chicken
Fezf2 (XM_414411). Tbr1, accession AB689004 ENSPSIT00000004703, is 532 bp long, showing 87% identity to chicken Tbr1
(XR_026840). Rorb, with accession AB689002 ENSPSIT00000006123, measures 319 bp and is 90% identical to Green Anole
